resources.string: Built-in communication system, reminders, engagements tools, analytics and dashboards all in one place.
Providing real-time mobile access to surveys, reports and discussions from any mobile device.

string-array.name: ms_texts
string-array.item: Mobile app for maximum community engagement.
Never miss out on messages or opportunities with push notifications.
Earn points and redeem those points for rewards.

resources.string: Your Panel Access Code is the Unique Identification Number/Text for your respective Panel. If you don\'t have it yet, please contact your Panel Admin for the correct access code.
